Luthor Tyrell
Allegiance House Tyrell
Culture Reach
Father Theodore Tyrell

Books
  • A Storm of Swords (appendix)
  • A Feast for Crows (appendix)
For others with the same name, see Luthor.

Luthor Tyrell is a member of a junior branch of House Tyrell,[1] being the grandson of Ser Luthor Tyrell, a first cousin of Mace Tyrell, the Lord of Highgarden.[2] The only son of Ser Theodore Tyrell and his wife, Lia Serry, Luthor has an older sister, Elinor Tyrell.[3][2]

Character[ ]

Luthor is a squire.[3][2]
